findings.issue: IRT 3PL parameters may not be calibrated from real data
findings.recommended_fix: Review calibration process and consider re-calibration with real data

findings.issue: Question pool size per competency is below minimum required for CAT to differentiate and for reliable theta estimation
findings.recommended_fix: Increase question pool size to at least 15 per competency for CAT and 30+ for reliable theta estimation

findings.issue: Potential bias against AZ/CIS test-takers not fully addressed
findings.recommended_fix: Conduct thorough DIF analysis and adjust questions as necessary to ensure fairness

findings.issue: SE threshold may not be appropriate
findings.recommended_fix: Review and adjust SE threshold as necessary to ensure accurate assessment
Review and update temporal decay rationale with evidence-based information
